title: The OW Nerds' Modpack
description: Adventured focused modpack meant to be played with other people made by an Overwatch Nerd.
body:
# The OW Nerds' Modpack

This modpack brings a whole new level of adventure to Minecraft. It's packed with features that enhance the exploration and discovery aspects of the game! New dungeons, quests, villages, mobs, and so much more!!

It was originally created as a fun modpack to play with my friends, but I made the decision to host it on modrinth in order to easily update and add mods. Since I had the main goal of creating a modpack that enhances the game but not to the point where it fundamentally feels like it's a game withing a game; it is the perfect pack if you are looking to **enhance** your Minecraft experience. 

In addition to the adventure-focused changes, this modpack also includes performance mods to ensure smooth gameplay. It's designed for multiplayer fun, so gather your friends and embark on an unforgettable Minecraft adventure together!

**Should work without having to change any of the mods on a server. Simply copy the mods folder to mods folder of whatever you're using to host the server. Take note of the current Fabric and Minecraft version being used. I recommend a minimum of 2 gigabytes of memory and a maximum of 4 gigabytes of memory. You can use whatever texture shader pack you want. Ideally the performance mods should give everyone a smooth experience.**

**For any issues, contact me on Discord: gamecrasher**

### **THERE IS NO OFFICIAL SERVER, THIS MODPACK IS ONLY AVAILABLE VIA MODRINTH** 

## Included Mods

Here are the mods that are not readily visible via Modrinth's ecosystem. (i.e. are not linked in the dependencies) 

### CT Overhaul Village

Enhances and creates new villages and pillager outposts, that perfectly fit into your Minecraft world.

- **Mod Link**: [CT Overhaul Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
- **Creator**: [ChoiceTheorem](https://modrinth.com/user/ChoiceTheorem)

### Sky Villages

Explore massive and beautiful villages in the sky!

- **Mod Link**: [Sky-Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/sky-villages)
- **Creator**: [aureljz](https://modrinth.com/user/aureljz)

### masady's mods
These mods add vanilla enhancements to the game.

- **Mods**: Malilib, Tweakaroo, and Item Scroller
- **Creator**: [masady's CurseForge Page](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/masady/projects)

---
